response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling fintech AI teams, deep regulatory fintech domain expertise, and proven production experience with multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes financial environments — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang high-throughput apps)
Hands-on with agentic tooling (MCP code generators at re:cinq) and open-source AI-adjacent infrastructure
Proven ability to lead technical projects independently and ship complex systems across domains
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks clear track record in regulated fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
No demonstrated architectural ownership of model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent AI systems in production
